question_text: Power is defined as the rate at which energy is transferred or converted. Which of the following statements correctly describes what this means?

options.label: A
options.text: Power measures the total amount of energy used by a device

options.label: B
options.text: Power measures how quickly energy is transferred or used per unit of time

options.label: C
options.text: Power is the same as the total energy stored in a system

options.label: D
options.text: Power describes the type of energy being transferred

correct_answer: Power measures how quickly energy is transferred or used per unit of time
explanation: Power tells us the rate at which energy is being used or transferred. Rather than measuring the total amount of energy (which would be measured in joules), power measures how much energy is transferred every second. Power is measured in watts (W), where 1 watt = 1 joule per second.
